case_title: LAUREL ELLEN FONTANA VS. LAURENCE S. L. GLAZIER

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT, HIS WIFE RENEE APPEARS ON HIS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,660.00 FILED BY FONTANA, LAUREL ELLEN AS TO DEFENDANT GLAZIER, LAURENCE S. L. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FONTANA, LAUREL ELLEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GLAZIER, LAURENCE S. L. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
